mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_tb (member_id, login_id, password, name, email, role) VALUES (member_seq.NEXTVAL, #{loginId}, #{password}, #{name}, #{email}, 'USER')
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_tb WHERE login_id = #{loginId}
SELECT * FROM member_tb ORDER BY member_id
mapper.update: UPDATE member_tb SET face_encoding = #{faceEncoding} WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
UPDATE member_tb SET face_encoding = NULL WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT member_id, face_encoding FROM member_tb WHERE face_encoding IS NOT NULL
SELECT * FROM member_tb WHERE social_type = #{socialType} AND social_id = #{socialId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_tb (member_id, login_id, password, name, email, role, social_type, social_id) VALUES (member_seq.NEXTVAL, #{loginId}, 'SOCIAL_OAUTH', #{name}, #{email}, 'USER', #{socialType}, #{socialId})
mapper.select: SELECT login_id FROM member_tb WHERE name = #{name} AND email = #{email} AND social_type IS NULL FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE member_tb SET ban_until = #{banUntil} WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
UPDATE member_tb SET ban_until = NULL WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM member_tb
AND (LOWER(login_id) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%')
AND role = #{role}
ORDER BY member_id
